concept: The Objective Authority. A highly secure, functional, and transparent enterprise security dashboard. UI is brutally honest, prioritizing clarity, text contrast, and rigid grid layouts over decorative elements.

typography.rules: Avoid center alignment for dense data. Use Mono font for all metadata (roles, timestamps, document IDs, access logs) to enforce the 'Control Room' technical feel.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Strict 'Control Room' grid hierarchy. Density over whitespace for data, but generous padding (p-6, p-8) inside major containers.
layout_and_spacing.page_layout: Top navigation bar (sticky, z-50, solid white bg, border-b). Main content below. Admin views use a dense sidebar or sub-navigation tabs.
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6. Every pixel must be utilized. Use h-full on children.
layout_and_spacing.surface_strategy: Grid Borders: Expose the skeleton. Container uses border-collapse style layout, items use subtle borders. No heavy drop shadows. Use 1px solid borders to define edges.

component_strategies.buttons: Minimal border radius (rounded-sm or rounded-none). High contrast. Primary uses International Klein Blue (#002FA7). Destructive uses Signal Red (#FF3B30).
component_strategies.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border (border-border), no shadow. Hover: Slight lift (-translate-y-1), border color darkens.
component_strategies.badges_and_chips: MANDATORY for Roles (Admin, Manager, Employee, Intern), Departments, and Sensitivity levels. Use solid sharp rectangles. Font MUST be Mono, tiny, uppercase.
component_strategies.forms_and_inputs: Shadcn standard inputs. Focus state must be a sharp 2px ring of Primary color. No soft glows.
component_strategies.tables: Shadcn Table. Highly dense. Use monospaced font for timestamps and IDs. Ensure row hover state is distinctly tinted (e.g., bg-muted/50).
component_strategies.modals_and_dialogs: Flat solid background. Never use glassmorphism for a security app (it feels too 'consumer'). Hard edges, stark contrast.

login_page.layout: Split screen (50/50). Left: Stark white login form. Right: Architectural minimal image overlay.
login_page.demo_accounts: Provide 4 quick-login buttons for the demo roles (Admin, Manager, Employee, Intern) above or below the standard form to eliminate friction.
login_page.security_branding: Add a prominent 'SOC2 Compliant' or 'Enterprise Grade' visual trust signal near the form.

chat_interface.layout: Center chat feed, right-aligned Explainability Side Panel (width: 30-40%).
chat_interface.messages: User: Right-aligned, primary blue bubble. AI: Left-aligned, muted grey bubble.
chat_interface.citations: Cited docs must appear as inline clickable Monospace pills within the AI response. Clicking highlights the doc in the side panel.
chat_interface.guardrails: If a query triggers a security guardrail, render a full-width Warning (Yellow) or Destructive (Red) banner inside the chat feed immediately before the AI response.

documents_library.layout: Data table or dense bento list.
documents_library.metadata: Columns MUST include: Document Name, Uploader, Department, Target Role, Sensitivity Level (Low, Medium, High).
documents_library.actions: Upload Document button (Admin only) opens a strict, wizard-like Shadcn Dialog form.

audit_logs.columns: Timestamp (Mono), User (Badge), Query Snippet, Result (Access Granted / Access Denied).
audit_logs.visuals: Access Denied rows should have a subtle red background tint (bg-red-50) and a red 'Denied' badge.

access_denied_states.messaging: Clinical and objective. 'Error 403: Security Policy Violation.' or 'Insufficient Clearance.'
access_denied_states.visuals: Stark red thin border, minimal icon (Lucide ShieldAlert or EyeOff). No playful illustrations.

motion_and_interactions.philosophy: Minimalist and objective. No bouncing, no spring animations.
motion_and_interactions.hover: Explicit text color changes. Border darkening.

login_background.description: Black and white concrete abstract building architecture. Use as right-side full-bleed image on the login page to convey structure and security.

icons.guidance: Use technical, strict icons: Shield, ShieldAlert, Lock, Unlock, EyeOff, FileText, Fingerprint, Terminal, UserCog.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: All text must pass WCAG AA (4.5:1).
accessibility_and_testing.data_testid_rules: CRITICAL: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case. Examples: data-testid='login-btn-admin', data-testid='chat-input-field', data-testid='upload-doc-submit', data-testid='audit-log-row'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard Tailwind CSS classes mapping to the hex colors defined here.
Do NOT use generic standard fonts (Inter, Roboto). Apply the specified fonts via Google Fonts.
Shadcn components MUST be used for Tabs, Tables, Dialogs, Selects, and Inputs.
Ensure the application strictly enforces the RBAC logic visually by hiding admin tabs for non-admin roles.
In the chat, the Explainability panel must clearly list which documents were queried and show the user's matching attributes.
